name: online-exam-system
description: Unified online exam system deployment config with shared dependencies

scripts.build:frontend: node -e "process.env.CI='false'; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync('npm run build', { cwd: 'app', stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.build: npm run install:server && npm run install:frontend && npm run build:frontend && node copy-build.js
